# SecTrustedApplication

**Class**

An opaque type that contains information about a trusted app.

## Declaration

```swift
class SecTrustedApplication
```

## Overview

Use the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecTrustedApplicationCreateFromPath(_:_:)] method to create a new trusted app instance.

## Conforms To

- Equatable
- Hashable
